items.title: Unlock Wondrous Tails
items.instructions: NPC: Unctuous Adventurer (X:7.0, Y:5.9).

items.title: 1. Receive a Wondrous Tails Journal
items.instructions: Pick up a journal with sixteen randomized objectives from Khloe Aliapoh. A new journal appears every Tuesday at 1:00 a.m. PDT. Your journal is stored in Key Items and you must resolve the previous one before taking another.

items.title: 2. Complete Objectives to Obtain Seals
items.instructions: Complete journal duties to earn up to 9 seals, one seal per objective. Older duties can be cleared unsynced with Unrestricted Party. Party Finder groups often use "WT" to mean one unsynced clear for Wondrous Tails.

items.title: 3. Hand in the Wondrous Tails Journal
items.unlockName: 3. Hand in the Wondrous Tails Journal
items.instructions: Turn it in after 9 seals for the base reward plus any completed horizontal, vertical, or diagonal lines. A journal lasts two weeks from the Tuesday it was issued. Limited Jobs cannot turn in Wondrous Tails journals.

items.title: Low-level and High-level states
items.instructions: Low-level is the default journal and includes duties from level 1 to 60. High-level includes duties from level 1 to 100, excludes level 50 trials, and gives 3 reward options per tier. As of Patch 7.0, high-level unlocks after completing Dawntrail.

items.title: Low-level duty pools
items.instructions: Low-level journal pools include: Dungeons (Lv. 1-49, 50, 51-59, 60) Crystal Tower: The Labyrinth of the Ancients | Syrcus Tower | The World of Darkness Shadow of Mhach: The Void Ark | The Weeping City of Mhach | Dun Scaith Alexander, Bahamut coils, ARR extremes, Heavensward extremes, Treasure Hunt / Deep Dungeons, and PvP objectives.

items.title: High-level duty pools
items.instructions: High-level journal pools include: Leveling and high-level dungeon groups plus Dungeons (Lv. 100) Alliance raid sets from ARR through Endwalker plus Jeuno: The First Walk | San d'Oria: The Second Walk Raid series from Bahamut through AAC, Heavensward / Stormblood / Shadowbringers / Endwalker extreme pools, Treasure Hunt / Deep Dungeons, and PvP objectives. Castrum Meridianum | The Praetorium do not count for the High-level Dungeons (Lv. 50 & 60) objective.

items.title: Reward tiers
items.instructions: Reward tiers are cumulative. 9 Seals: 50% combat EXP plus one of Allagan Platinum Piece | Allagan Tomestones of Poetics | Timeworn Gargantuaskin Map 1 Line: MGP Gold Card | Khloe's Bronze Certificate of Commendation | Allagan Tomestones of Mnemonics 2 Lines: MGP Platinum Card | Khloe's Silver Certificate of Commendation | Allagan Tomestones of Mathematics 3 Lines: MGP Platinum Card | Khloe's Gold Certificate of Commendation | Khloe's Silver Certificate of Commendation

items.title: Second Chance points
items.instructions: Earn up to 9 Second Chance points by clearing objectives with party members who are new to the duty. Retry costs 1 point and lets you rerun a completed duty for another sticker. Shuffle costs 2 points and rearranges seals; it is only available between 3 and 7 stickers. Guildhests are ineligible for Second Chance points.

items.title: Wondrous Tails achievements
items.instructions: The achievement series runs from And Khloe Was Her Name-o I | And Khloe Was Her Name-o VII. Notable rewards are Khloe's Friend | Khloe's Best Friend. For achievement credit, only the 9 seals are required; lines are not needed.
